name: USA BMX / BMX Canada
notes: Importer uses the public USA BMX/BMX Canada find-tracks backend endpoint for official locator records: names, addresses, states/provinces, postal codes, and provider coordinates. Route centerlines still require per-track verification.

name: Fédération Française de Cyclisme BMX Racing
notes: Importer reads the official FFC BMX Racing Google My Maps KML embedded on the FFC équipements sportifs page and enriches city, department, and region with the French Base Adresse Nationale reverse geocoding API.

name: BMX New Zealand
notes: Importer reads the official BMXNZ club finder page. BMXNZ lists club addresses but not GPS coordinates, so coordinates are cached from OpenStreetMap Nominatim and marked as geocoded rather than provider GPS.

name: UCI BMX Racing
notes: UCI is the global discipline authority, but this page is not a public global BMX track locator. Use UCI event and venue exports where available, then merge with national federation locator feeds.

name: British Cycling Club Finder
notes: Official Club Finder supports BMX Racing filters, but direct automated access is currently protected by Cloudflare. Needs an approved export/API path or manual federation data agreement before importing at scale.

name: AusCycling Club Finder
notes: Official page is a Next/Payload application. BMX Racing clubs should be imported only after identifying a public approved API or receiving an AusCycling export.

name: Cycling New Zealand BMX
notes: National BMX reference source. Operational club locator records are imported from BMX New Zealand.

name: OpenStreetMap Overpass BMX Locator
notes: Supplemental locator-only importer for countries where federation directories do not expose a usable export. Records are filtered from OpenStreetMap BMX/track tags, enriched with Nominatim reverse geocoding, and marked locator-only so riders still map/verify the actual start gate, centerline, sprint zones, and finish line.
